warlord_scroll.title: Research the Rec Companions scroll at a Research Pedestal

recruit_army.title: Field a combat unit of 6+ Villager Recruits — deploy them before a Cataclysm boss fight as distractions

subtitle.text: The Recruits do not survive the Monstrosity. They are not supposed to. They are supposed to draw its attention.

description: CH.11 · THE WARLORD COMPACT
▸ The Warlord Compact covers Villager Recruits
as a combat support tool.
Not as allies. As tactical assets.
In Ch11 boss fights, they are distraction units.
They die. That is their function.
◈ VILLAGER RECRUITS — 6 UNIT TYPES
└ ✦ Footman: melee, sword + shield, 20 HP
Use in: Revenant fight (melee distraction)
└ ✦ Crossbowman: ranged, 24 blocks range
Use in: Ignis fight (ranged DPS from safe position)
└ ✦ Knight: heavy melee, 30 HP, slower
Use in: Monstrosity (tank hits while you damage)
└ ✦ Archer: bow, mobile, lower HP than crossbowman
└ ✦ Cavalry: mounted, fastest, flanking role
└ ✦ Siege Crossbowman: long range, stationary
Set up before Emulator fight for sustained fire
◈ BOSS FIGHT DEPLOYMENT
└ Monstrosity: 4 Knights + 4 Crossbowmen
Knights absorb melee attacks; crossbowmen DPS
└ Ignis: 6 Crossbowmen at maximum range
Ignis priority targets: you first, then ranged
Use Recruits to split aggro
└ Emulator: Siege setup — deploy before entering arena
Emulator AI targets nearest entity — spread units
◈ GARRISON MANAGEMENT
└ Recruit base: requires Villager Recruits barracks block
└ Feed/pay recruits with emeralds or items (MCA trades)
└ Recall ability: /recruit recall (or check mod hotkey)
└ Recruits do NOT respawn after death — replace them
◈ SCROLL: The Warlord Compact
└ Found in Villager Recruits barracks structures,
military outpost loot, garrison chest loot
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: Recruit unit type reference,
siege crossbowman deployment guide, garrison design
▸ The Compact is between the Warlord and the Recruits.
The Warlord survives.
The Recruits fulfill their contract.
Nobody in the Compact believes this is unfair.
That is the compact.
▶ Find The Warlord Compact scroll [check]
▶ Field 6+ Villager Recruits before a boss fight [check]
◇ Recruits work even in singleplayer.
The Monstrosity fight is measurably easier with
4 knights drawing its attention.
Measure the difference before dismissing it.
